See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 22170 => 'Expresso', 22171 => 'Orange', 22172 => 'HAYO', 22175 => 'Promobile', 2217536 => 'Orange', 221757 => 'Origines', 2217585 => 'Orange', 22176 => 'Free', 22177 => 'Orange', 22178 => 'Orange', 22179 => 'ADIE', ];
